nasb.text: For if anyone is a hearer of the word and not a doer, he is like a man who looks at his natural face in a mirror;

esv.text: For if anyone is a hearer of the word and not a doer, he is like a man who looks intently at his natural face in a mirror.

cnv.text: 因為人若只作聽道的人，不作行道的人，他就像一個人對著鏡子看自己本來的面貌，

ccb.text: 因为人听道而不行道，就像照镜子一样，

csbs.text: 因为，如果有人是这话语的听者，而不是实行者，这个人就像人对着镜子观看自己生来的面貌，
